arts.ttl: Arsenal dressing room stance on Man City frustrations as 'leaked' messages reveals true feelings
arts.sum: Arsenal players believe they have one over on title rivals Manchester City after the fallout from their 2-2 draw at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: Who is Kaden Braithwaite? Things to know about Man City starlet
arts.sum: So the fact that Braithwaite is a left-footed centre-back who can also play left-back will certainly be music to the City manager's ears. Aged just 16 years and 229 days, Braithwaite became the third-youngest player to ever play for City on Tuesday evening, lining up from the off against Watford in the third round of the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta gives worrying David Raya update after Erling Haaland claim
arts.sum: Arsenal will take on Leicester City in their next Premier League match but Mikel Arteta's Gunners find themselves dealing with a number of significant injury concerns

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon left red-faced after making Liverpool transfer promise to team-mates
arts.sum: Liverpool tried and failed with a bid to sign Anthony Gordon during the summer transfer window and the winger is now close to committing his future to Newcastle

arts.ttl: Newcastle turn attention to World Cup winner should key star leave for AC Milan
arts.sum: The future of Kieran Trippier at Newcastle United remains up in the air heading into the January transfer window as AC Milan remain interested in the 34-year-old defender. The Englishman has lost his place at St James Park to Tino Livramento so far this season and it looks like Eddie Howe will continue with the […] The post Newcastle turn attention to World Cup winner should key star leave for AC Milan appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Premier League title race after Rodri's season-ending injury
arts.sum: A massive blow to Man City's hopes of claiming a fifth successive Premier League crown in what could be Pep Guardiola's final season at the helm, the fabled Opta supercomputer has examined the title race in closer detail following the Euro 2024 winner's injury. Opta only offer five sides a chance of winning the Premier League title and even then the stat experts have shown little faith in unlikely candidates Newcastle United and Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Premier League make major rule change decision that impacts Man United and Man City
arts.sum: The introduction of semi-automated offside technology (SOAT) has reportedly been delayed until later this year

arts.ttl: Man City secure 'significant victory' in legal battle against Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester City may have 'convinced' an independent panel that the Premier League's rules on sponsorship deals are not sufficient in a boost to their hopes of contesting 115 alleged breaches of financial regulations. Though this vote and the rule is not directly linked to City's 115 alleged breaches, plenty of these charges relate to sponsorship agreements.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Anthony Gordon pursuit takes twist as 'lucrative deal' close to being agreed
arts.sum: Liverpool were close to signing Anthony Gordon from Newcastle in the summer before talks over a deal collapsed - and the England star is now poised to commit his future to the Magpies

arts.ttl: PIF's stance on selling Newcastle United as long-term plan set to be ripped up
arts.sum: The Saudi Public Investment fund have been frustrated and anchored by the Premier League’s Profit and Sustainability Rules since their takeover of Newcastle United in...
